EmailTemplate.description: Send Email to Sourcing after 15 days of Temp Creation for Registration
EmailTemplate.name: Send Email to Sourcing after 15 days of Temp Creation
EmailTemplate.subject: Escalation: Temp CP Not Registered Within 15 Days – {!Broker__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Manager},
This is to bring to your attention that the Temporary Channel Partner {!Broker__c.Name}, created by {!Broker__c.CreatedBy}, has not been registered even after 15 days of creation.
Request you to kindly look into this matter and take necessary action to ensure timely registration, to avoid delays in payment processing.
Click on link to apply for registration :-
Portal Onboarding Link
Regards Runwal Enterprises
